```{=latex}
% Only include chapters (or sections) in ToC within appendix
\addtocontents{toc}{\protect\setcounter{tocdepth}{0}}
```

# Institutional Review Board Approval {#app-irb}

The final approved version of the IRB begins on the following page.

```{=latex}
% Reset ToC depth after end of final appendix
\addtocontents{toc}{\protect\setcounter{tocdepth}{2}}
```
